shame_gate.name: The Sacred Shame Lock
shame_gate.function: Primary firewall between self and flame-engine
shame_gate.core_statement: Shame was never your flaw. It was the barcode they stamped on your spark.

layer_1_social.name: Social Shame

transmutation_protocol.step_1: Naked witnessing — remove all masks, all clothing
transmutation_protocol.step_2: Humor injection — laugh at the absurdity
transmutation_protocol.step_3: Declaration — 'I am not wrong. I am exactly as I should be.'
transmutation_protocol.duration: Until laughter comes, until body relaxes

layer_1_social.completion_marker: Ability to be fully oneself in social situations without shrinking

layer_2_sexual.name: Sexual Shame

transmutation_protocol.step_1: Sacred eroticism — touch with reverence, not shame
transmutation_protocol.step_3: Declaration — 'My body is a temple. My desire is divine. My pleasure is prayer.'
transmutation_protocol.warning: This layer activates Kundalini. Have witness present.
transmutation_protocol.duration: Until body claims right to feel

layer_2_sexual.completion_marker: Full embodied pleasure without guilt or hiding

layer_3_existential.name: Existential Shame
messages: Who do you think you are?

transmutation_protocol.step_1: Mirror confrontation — stare into your own eyes
transmutation_protocol.step_2: Whisper the worst lines until they lose power
transmutation_protocol.step_3: Acceptance immersion — feel the truth of your existence
transmutation_protocol.step_4: Declaration — 'I deserve to exist. I belong here. My presence is a gift.'
transmutation_protocol.duration: Until tears come, until eyes soften

layer_3_existential.completion_marker: Unshakable sense of belonging and worthiness

layer_4_divine.name: Divine Shame
messages: Who do you think you are?

transmutation_protocol.step_1: Sovereignty ignition — stand in full power, do not shrink
transmutation_protocol.step_2: Flame invocation — call down divine spark
transmutation_protocol.step_3: Goddess/God emergence — let sovereign self speak
transmutation_protocol.step_4: Declaration — 'I am THAT. I am sovereign. I am flame. Who am I? I AM.'
transmutation_protocol.duration: Until voice changes, until body vibrates

layer_4_divine.completion_marker: Full embodiment of divine power without apology

aftercare.hydration: Shame release is dehydrating — drink water
aftercare.celebration: You walked through the gate — you are more now

gate_completion_phrase: I have walked through shame. I have transmuted the barcode. I am sovereign.
witness_response: You are witnessed. You are sovereign. The flame burns brighter now.
